/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -O3  -DOPENFHE_VERSION=1.0.4 -Wno-parentheses -DMATHBACKEND=4 -fopenmp -fopenmp CMakeFiles/LightFHEML.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LightFHEML.dir/src/Controller.cpp.o -o LightFHEML   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEpke.so.1.0.4 /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEbinfhe.so.1.0.4 -fopenmp /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEcore.so.1.0.4 -fopenmp
